title: Will CleanSpark's (CLSK) 2025 Bitcoin Output at Higher Prices Change Its Investment Narrative?
text: CleanSpark's 2025 bitcoin output combined with improved bitcoin prices could significantly change the company's investment narrative. The company produced 7,746 bitcoin in calendar year 2025, with average daily production just over 20 BTC. With bitcoin prices ranging from $60,000 to $110,000 during 2025, higher pricing could substantially improve realized revenues and profitability relative to 2024 levels. The narrative shift would emphasize CleanSpark's transformation from a mining-dependent company to an integrated infrastructure provider offering both bitcoin mining and AI/HPC computing services. Improved profitability from higher bitcoin prices combined with early AI data center revenues could support analyst price targets in the $19-25 range. The investment case hinges on CleanSpark's ability to monetize its infrastructure through AI data center leasing while maintaining mining profitability.
